ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Date, flesh and skin, pitted, dried

ingredients_text: Wholegrain wheat flakes 23,7%, wholegrain rye flakes 23,4%, wholegrain oat flakes 17,9%, raisins 16,1%, sultanas 10%, sugared banana chips 3,8% (banana, coconut oil, cane sugar), dried date pieces 1,2%, sugared 1%, linseeds 0,6%, sunflower seeds 0,6%, dried apricot pieces coconut chips 1,2% (coconut, cane sugar), hazelnut kernels 15%. May contain traces of peanuts, other nuts, milk, soya and sesame.
